name: United Health Products, Inc.
summary: United Health Products, Inc. (UEEC) develops, manufactures, and markets CelluSTAT, a patented hemostatic gauze derived from chemically treated cotton cellulose. The product holds FDA 510(k) approval (2012) for superficial wound bleeding and is pending FDA Class III Premarket Approval (PMA) for human surgical use. The company targets hospitals, surgery centers, first responders, military, hemodialysis centers, dental offices, and veterinary hospitals, and is evaluating sale, merger, or commercial partnership options.
